taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data Science, Python, SQL, Cloud Technology, Model Deployment
skill_match_scores: Data Science:1.0, Python:1.0, SQL:1.0, Cloud Technology:1.0, Model Deployment:0.5
must_have_quals: 3+ years of relevant Data Science experience, 3+ years' experience programming in Python, 3+ years' experience programming in SQL, 2+ year experience working with Cloud Technology (GCP, AWS or Azure), 1+ year experience deploying models in production, Bachelor's degree or equivalent work experience in Business Analytics, Economics, Physics, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, or related discipline
preferred_quals: Experience in Google Cloud/BigQuery, 2 plus years of healthcare or health insurance experience, Strong problem-solving experience with a history of making business impact, Knowledge of Time Series forecasting techniques, and Machine learning methods including classics like SARIMA, exponential smoothing, time series regressions, and machine learning methods like LSTM, XGBoost, etc
core_responsibilities: Model Development: Develop and implement advanced machine learning models for forecasting and predictive analytics. As a key member of our team, you will be responsible for developing and standardizing forecasting applications using time series techniques to provide forward-looking insights to our members, to improve Member experience, ML-Ops: Develop, deploy and maintain machine learning models in production, ensuring robust and scalable solutions, Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams, including product managers, engineers, and business analysts, to understand business needs and deliver data-driven solutions, Innovation: Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in data science and machine learning, and apply them to improve existing processes and models, Reporting: Create and present detailed reports and visualizations to communicate findings and recommendations to stakeholders, Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work with complex datasets, Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
job_summary: CVS Health is committed to delivering a simpler, more meaningful, and personal health care experience. As a Senior Data Scientist, you will be working on the Medicare Analytics team, developing advanced machine learning models and collaborating with cross-functional teams to improve member experience and support business decisions.
